headline: Interparfums Readies for Q1 Earnings: Key Insights for Investors
summary: Interparfums heads into its May 5 Q1 earnings report with EPS seen down 13.6%, as tariffs, FX costs and promo spending squeeze margins.

headline: Apollo, Digital Realty Trust And Archer-Daniels-Midland On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: Apollo Global shares rose 1.4% to close at $130.46 on Friday, while Archer-Daniels-Midland shares gained 0.5% to settle at $74.94.
